title: Fence Erectors
description: Erect and repair fences and fence gates, using hand and power tools.

tasks.text: Establish the location for a fence, and gather information needed to ensure that there are no electric cables or water lines in the area.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Set metal or wooden posts in upright positions in postholes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure and lay out fence lines and mark posthole positions, following instructions, drawings, or specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Align posts, by lines or sighting, and verify vertical alignment of posts, using plumb bobs or spirit levels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach rails or tension wire along bottoms of posts to form fencing frames.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dig postholes, using spades, posthole diggers, or power-driven augers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach fence rail supports to posts, using hammers and pliers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble gates, and fasten gates into position, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix and pour concrete around bases of posts, or tamp soil into postholes to embed posts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make rails for fences, by sawing lumber or by cutting metal tubing to required lengths.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Nail top and bottom rails to fence posts, or insert them in slots on posts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Discuss fencing needs with customers, and estimate and quote prices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stretch wire, wire mesh, or chain link fencing between posts, and attach fencing to frames.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Complete top fence rails of metal fences by connecting tube sections, using metal sleeves.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Erect alternate panel, basket weave, and louvered fences.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Insert metal tubing through rail supports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Nail pointed slats to rails to construct picket fences.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Construct and repair barriers, retaining walls, trellises, and other types of fences, walls, and gates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weld metal parts together, using portable gas welding equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Blast rock formations and rocky areas with dynamite to facilitate posthole digging.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
